Do I Wanna Know?::Hozier.matched_title: Do I Wanna Know? (BBC Live Lounge)

Wake Me Up::Aloe Blacc & Mike Einziger.note: Manually pinned: the credited duo's acoustic recording is filed on Deezer under Aloe Blacc alone.

Take Me to Church::Demi Lovato.note: Demi Lovato's BBC Radio 1 Live Lounge cover was never released to streaming. The preview button plays Hozier's original studio recording so the player can still hear the lyrics; the YouTube link above the button opens the actual cover.

Jolene::Lil Nas X.note: Lil Nas X's BBC Radio 1 Live Lounge cover is not on Deezer. The preview button plays Dolly Parton's original; click the YouTube link above the button to hear the cover.

Paris::TikTok / overturning of Roe v. Wa.note: This reperformance has no second performer. The TikTok responses use the same Chainsmokers studio audio; the preview is identical to the Original Performance preview by design.

True Colors::LGBTQ+ communities & Lauper.note: The 'reperformance' here is the song's adoption as an LGBTQ+ anthem (and Lauper's continued advocacy via the True Colors Fund). The audio is the same 1986 recording; the preview plays it.

drivers license::Rick Astley.note: Rick Astley's BBC Radio 2 Piano Room performance is not released to streaming. The preview button plays Olivia Rodrigo's original; the YouTube link above opens the actual Astley cover.
